AQ Download Ptolemy Home '07 Conference Home Tutorial Presentations Previous Conferences Skip to sidebar Ptolemy Tutorial Monday, February 12, 2007 - Berkeley, California We offered a Ptolemy Developer's Tutorial on Monday, February 12, 2007 in 540 A

r's Tutorial on Monday, February 12, 2007 in 540 A/B Cory on the UC Berkeley campus. This tutorial was for Java programmers who are interested in extending Ptolemy. 30 people attended the tutorial. The agenda was: 8:00 Registration, Continental Bre

The agenda was: 8:00 Registration, Continental Breakfast, Laptop setup 8:30 Overview of the day 8:45 Building Ptolemy II (Christopher Brooks) CVS access configure Coding Style 9:45 Break 10:15 Developing Actors (Yang Zhao, Eleftherios D. Matsikoudis)

ing Actors (Yang Zhao, Eleftherios D. Matsikoudis) Adding an actor to the tree Testing 12:00 Lunch (Provided) 12:45 Developing Codegen Actors (Gang Zhou, Man-Kit Leung) Also available as $PTII/ptolemy/codegen/c/doc/tutorial.doc in the Ptolemy II CVS

/codegen/c/doc/tutorial.doc in the Ptolemy II CVS Tree 1:30 Domain Overview (Edward Lee) 1:50 Nesting Domains (Christopher Brooks) Read section 5 from Antoon Goderisa, Christopher Brooks, lkay Altintas, Edward A. Lee. Composing Different Models of Co

s, Edward A. Lee. Composing Different Models of Computation in Ptolemy II and Kepler . 2007 Proceedings, International Conference on Computational Science (ICCS), May, 2007; To appear at International Conference on Computational Science (ICCS) 2007 .

Conference on Computational Science (ICCS) 2007 . 2:10 Break 2:30 Extending Domains and the User Interface (Edward A. Lee) Please note that the Ptolemy Miniconference was the following day, Tuesday, February 12, 2007. Contact Update Help Copyright ©
